panels.title: Server Uptime

panels.description: CPU Core count of Plex Server
panels.title: Host CPU Count

panels.description: Stream counts and transcodes for Plex Server

targets.expr: count( sum by (session) ( rate(play_seconds_total{stream_type=~"(directplay|DirectPlay)"}[$__rate_interval]) ) > 0 ) or on() vector(0)
count( sum by (session) ( rate(play_seconds_total{stream_type="transcode", transcode_type=~"(video|both)"}[$__rate_interval]) ) > 0 ) or on() vector(0)
count( sum by (session) ( rate(play_seconds_total{stream_type="transcode", transcode_type=~"(audio|both)"}[$__rate_interval]) ) > 0 ) or on() vector(0)
count( sum by (session) ( rate(play_seconds_total{subtitle_action="transcode"}[$__rate_interval]) ) > 0 ) or on() vector(0)
count( sum by (session) ( rate(play_seconds_total{subtitle_action="burn"}[$__rate_interval]) ) > 0 ) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Stream Counts

panels.description: Active stream sessions for Plex Server

defaults.noValue: Nothing is currently streaming on Plex

targets.expr: sum by (user, device_type, device, stream_resolution, stream_file_resolution, server, stream_bitrate, stream_type, what) ((label_join(label_join(rate(play_seconds_total{media_type="episode", stream_type!=""}[45s]), "what", " / ", "title", "child_title"), "what", " / ", "what", "grandchild_title") or label_join(rate(play_seconds_total{media_type!="episode", stream_type!=""}[45s]), "what", "", "title"))) > 0
